beats.title: Fort Aftermath
beats.boundaryReason: The session opens with the party wrapping up their investigation at the ruined fort and deciding what to carry back before leaving the site.
dateEvidence: The DM says the party awakens after the night in the temple.
The manifest starts the session on 1748-03-26.

beats.title: Return to Kerala
beats.boundaryReason: The party leaves the fort, rides west for several days, and arrives back in Kerala to report to Kesa.
dateEvidence: The DM says it is about three or four days back to town.
The manifest ends the session on 1748-03-29.
The arrival scene states it is late afternoon when they come into town.

beats.title: Stories at Krom's
beats.boundaryReason: After reporting in, the group settles at the inn, questions Krom about Arcas and recent travelers, and learns more about the festival atmosphere in Kerala.
dateEvidence: The party has just returned to town in late afternoon.
Krom serves them drinks and the DM describes a typical summer afternoon at the inn.

beats.title: Maps and Suspicions
beats.boundaryReason: The inn conversation broadens into map talk, travel routes, and growing suspicion that Arcas and the strange artifacts point to a larger threat.
dateEvidence: This scene continues directly from the afternoon inn visit.
The group is still at Krom's before heading out to the smith.

beats.title: Josue's Spearheads
beats.boundaryReason: The group visits Josue the blacksmith, confirms Arcas's interest in Great War relics, and learns about the strange spearheads he left behind.
dateEvidence: Josue says he is finishing up and heading for a drink in the coolness of the evening.
The party leaves the inn and starts evening errands.

beats.title: Halfling Camp Warning
beats.boundaryReason: At the halfling camp, the party meets Bree Charmheart, discovers a caravan member hearing the same kind of voice, and realizes the danger may be spreading beyond the fort.
dateEvidence: The party walks through the festival camps at dinnertime.
The scene ends with the DM confirming it is night.

beats.title: Oasis Vigil
beats.boundaryReason: Delwath and later Seeker keep vigil by the oasis while Kenzo drinks at the inn, and Kendrasar interrupts the night to summon the group to the temple.
dateEvidence: The party explicitly decides who is spending the night by the oasis.
The DM says the sun sets, the moon rises, and it is around 10:30 or 11 PM.

beats.title: Kendrasar's Truth
beats.boundaryReason: In the temple, Kendrasar tests the party with a zone of truth, reveals that Shakun's protection is failing, and asks for their help before the festival.
dateEvidence: The scene begins immediately after the late-night summons from the oasis.
Kendrasar closes by saying it is late and they should talk more in the morning.
